settings.digest_help: Receive a periodic summary of new discussions, active threads, and new members.
settings.save_error: Could not save your preference. Please try again.

onboarding.modal_body: Get a periodic digest of the best discussions, new members, and what's been happening on the forum — delivered straight to your inbox.

settings.limit_new_help: Maximum number of new discussions to include in each digest.
settings.limit_hot_help: Maximum number of active (hot) discussions to include in each digest.
settings.limit_unread_help: Maximum number of unread discussions to surface per recipient.
settings.limit_leaderboard_help: Number of leaderboard entries to show in the digest (default 10, min 3). Requires huseyinfiliz-leaderboard.
settings.limit_badges_help: Maximum number of recent badge earners to list in the digest (default 5, min 3). Requires fof/badges.
settings.limit_pickem_help: Maximum number of upcoming matches, recent results, and leaderboard entries to show in the digest (default 5, min 3). Requires huseyinfiliz/pickem.
settings.enable_picks_help: Show upcoming games, recent results, and the picks leaderboard in the digest. Requires resofire/picks.
settings.limit_picks_label: CFB Picks — max items per section
settings.limit_picks_help: Maximum number of upcoming games, recent results, and leaderboard entries to show in the digest (default 5, min 3). Requires resofire/picks.
settings.picks_leaderboard_scope_help: Which leaderboard to show: the most recently completed week, the current season, or all-time standings.
settings.limit_gamepedia_help: Maximum number of games to show in the Most Discussed and Newly Added sections (default 5, min 3). Requires huseyinfiliz/gamepedia.
settings.limit_resofire_gamepedia_label: Resofire Gamepedia — max games per section
settings.limit_resofire_gamepedia_help: Maximum number of games to show in the Most Discussed, Newly Added, and Top Genres sections (default 5, min 3). Requires resofire/gamepedia.
settings.limit_favorites_help: Maximum number of favorite discussions to show, ranked by likes/reactions during the period (default 6, min 3). Set to 0 to disable. Uses fof/reactions if enabled, otherwise flarum/likes.
settings.enable_awards_help: Show active and upcoming awards in the digest. Requires huseyinfiliz/awards.
settings.queue_chunk_size_help: Number of users dispatched per scheduler minute (default 200, min 50, max 10000). Small forums: 200–500. Large forums on dedicated servers: 1000–10000. Higher values finish faster but use more memory per cycle.
settings.queue_delay_help: Seconds before queued jobs become available to workers (default 0). In window mode this is rarely needed — the window itself spreads load across time. Only useful if using the two-phase digest:enqueue command on very large forums.
settings.queue_tries_help: How many times a failed digest job will be retried before being moved to the failed jobs table (default 3). Retries use exponential backoff: 30s, 60s, 120s. Note: if you have blomstra/database-queue installed, it has its own Retries setting — the lower of the two values will effectively apply. Recommended to set both extension settings to the same value.
settings.queue_name_help: The named queue digest jobs are pushed onto. Must match the --queue argument in your queue:work cron. Default: digest.
settings.limit_members_help: Maximum number of new members to show in each digest.
settings.hot_reply_weight_help: How much each reply counts toward a discussion's hotness score. Higher = more replies-driven.
settings.hot_recency_weight_help: How much recency affects hotness. Higher = newer posts score more strongly. Set to 0 to rank by replies only.
settings.featured_discussion_help: Enter a discussion ID to pin it as a featured discussion at the top of every digest. Leave blank to show no featured discussion.
settings.send_hour_help: The time of day your digest emails will start sending.
settings.send_window_start_help: The time of day your digest emails will start sending. Choose a quiet period when your forum has low activity — typically late night or early morning.
settings.send_window_end_help: Leave this the same as the start time to send all emails at once. Set it later to spread sending across several hours — recommended for larger forums. For example, a 2 a.m. start and 4 a.m. end means emails go out gradually between 2 and 4 a.m.
settings.timezone_help: Choose your own timezone — not your server's. The send time you set below will fire at that hour in whichever timezone you select here. For example, if you're in Chicago and want emails sent at 8 a.m. your time, select Central Time and set the send time to 8 a.m.
settings.weekly_day_help: Day of the week on which weekly digests are sent.
settings.monthly_day_help: Day of the month on which monthly digests are sent. Capped at 28 so February always works.

test_send.heading: Send Test Email
test_send.help: Send a live digest email immediately to any address. Uses your account's visibility to build content. Does not affect scheduled sends or unsubscribe tokens.
test_send.error_generic: Failed to send. Check your mail settings and try again.
test_send.theme_hint_light: Sends with light mode styles applied
test_send.theme_hint_dark: Sends with dark mode styles applied
test_send.theme_light_only: Light mode only — install and enable fof/nightmode to unlock dark mode emails

onboarding.mode_help: Controls how new users are enrolled in digest emails when their account is activated.
onboarding.mode_none: No default — users choose their own preference
onboarding.frequency_help: The digest frequency new users are automatically enrolled at. Only frequencies enabled in User Frequency Options above are available.

leaderboard.rankings_note: Rankings based on total points earned through posts, discussions, likes, badges, and daily logins.

pickem.upcoming_note: Don't miss your chance to pick — cutoff times below.

picks.confidence_note: Confidence mode is active — points are weighted by each player's confidence rating (1–10) on their picks.
picks.upcoming_note: Picks lock individually at each game's cutoff time.

awards.tallying: Results are being tallied. Stay tuned for the announcement!

unsubscribe.heading: Email Digest Preferences
unsubscribe.greeting: Hi, {name}. Choose how often you'd like to receive a digest of what's happening in {forum}.
unsubscribe.click_hint: Click an option to save your preference instantly.
unsubscribe.daily_desc: One email per day with the latest activity.
unsubscribe.monthly_desc: A monthly summary on the {day} of each month.
unsubscribe.off_desc: Don't send me any digest emails.

unsubscribe_saved.heading: Preferences saved
unsubscribe_saved.body: Your digest email preferences have been updated successfully.

unsubscribe_invalid.heading: This link is no longer valid
unsubscribe_invalid.body_expired: This unsubscribe link has either expired (links are valid for 90 days) or has already been used. A fresh link is included in every digest email we send you.
unsubscribe_invalid.body_signin: To manage your digest preferences, sign in to {forum} and visit your notification settings.
